title: Hesitation, Not Rejection
premise: GUA hesitates when LO first approaches at 00:03 — a moment of doubt, a brief internal resistance — but ultimately geser kursi dan kasih ruang. The sync still happens, slightly delayed.
premise_id: GUA ragu sejenak saat LO pertama kali mendekat di 00:03 — momen keraguan, resistensi internal singkat — tapi akhirnya tetap menggeser kursi dan memberi ruang. Sinkronisasi tetap terjadi, hanya sedikit tertunda.
change: GUA pauses for 15 seconds before responding to LO. During the pause, GUA thinks: 'Gua bisa sendiri.' But then looks at the bug again, at LO's face, and makes space. The delay is the only divergence.
change_id: GUA berhenti selama 15 detik sebelum merespons LO. Dalam jeda itu, GUA berpikir: 'Gua bisa sendiri.' Tapi kemudian melihat bug itu lagi, melihat wajah LO, dan memberi ruang. Keterlambatan adalah satu-satunya divergensi.
immediate_effect_id: Sinkronisasi tetap terjadi — hanya tertunda 15 detik. Tidak ada perubahan struktural. Bug timestamp tetap diperbaiki dalam 10 menit. genesis.txt tetap lahir di 00:08.
internal_summary_en: GUA pauses for 15 seconds when LO first approaches at sub-chapter 00:03. Hesitation, then yields. The sync still happens. No law is violated. The timestamp bug is still fixed together. genesis.txt is still co-authored. Downstream: no structural change — only a microscopic emotional delay that changes nothing.

lineage.canon_moment: LO berdiri di samping GUA, menunjuk layar: 'Lo ngerasa gak?'
lineage.divergence: GUA hesitates for 15 seconds. Internal monologue of resistance. Then yields.
downstream_effects: The sync happens, just 15 seconds later
The timestamp bug is still fixed in 10 minutes
No structural difference — only a microscopic emotional delay that changes nothing downstream

reason: No law is violated. The hesitation is within GUA's normal behavioral range. The sync remains organic (law-006). LO remains a stabilizing condition (law-002). The 15-second delay is a ripple, not a break.
